raw: {"questions":[{"label":"UX Alignment Check","name":"How do your current UX initiatives align with the CoE's strategic goals?","description":"Explores alignment between UX initiatives and strategic goals.","purpose":"competency","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation Reflection","name":"What are the biggest challenges you're facing in delegating tasks within your team?","description":"Surfaces any issues or challenges in effective task delegation within the team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder Engagement Challenges","name":"What's been the most challenging aspect of engaging with the CoE stakeholders?","description":"Identifies challenges in engaging with stakeholders effectively.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Impact Clarity","name":"Where do you feel the impact of UX has been most visible this quarter?","description":"Surfaces specific examples of where UX impact has been evident.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation Gap","name":"In what areas do you feel your delegation could improve to better manage the CoE?","description":"Identifies gaps in current delegation practices.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support Needs","name":"What specific support do you need from me to manage the CoE ux/ui effectively?","description":"Opens dialogue on support needed from the manager.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority Alignment","name":"How confident are you that your current priorities are aligned with what the CoE needs?","description":"Checks confidence in current priority alignment with CoE needs.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next Steps Commitment","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Drives toward commitment on next steps.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
